description_wiki: Uganda, officially the Republic of Uganda, is a landlocked country in East Africa.

description: city in and county seat of Onondaga County, New York, United States
description_wiki: Syracuse ( SIRR-ə-kewz, SERR-, -⁠kewss) is a city in New York, United States, and the county seat of Onondaga County.

Johannesburg ( joh-HAN-iss-burg, US also  -⁠HAHN-, Afrikaans: [jʊəˈɦanəsbœrχ] ; Xhosa: eGoli [ɛˈɡɔːli]; Zulu: iGoli [îˈɡóːli]), colloquially known as Jozi, Joburg or "The City of Gold", is the most populous city in South Africa.
South Africa, officially the Republic of South Africa (RSA), is the southernmost country in Africa.

entity: United States Citizenship and Immigration Services
aliases: Bureau of Citizenship and Immigration Services
description: immigration benefits agency of the United States government
description_wiki: United States Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) is an agency of the United States Department of Homeland Security (DHS) that administers the country's naturalization and immigration system.

entity: United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees
aliases: Office of the United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees (UNHCR)
description: United Nations agency mandated to protect and support refugees
description_wiki: The Office of the United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees (UNHCR) is a United Nations agency mandated to aid and protect refugees, forcibly displaced communities, and stateless people, and to assist in their voluntary repatriation, local integration or resettlement to a third country.

description: administrative capital of South Africa located in the Gauteng province
description_wiki: Pretoria ( prih-TOR-ee-ə, pree-; Afrikaans: [prəˈtʉəria] ) is the administrative capital of South Africa, serving as the seat of the executive branch of government, and as the host to all foreign embassies to the country.

The United States Department of Homeland Security (DHS) is the U.S. federal executive department responsible for public security, roughly comparable to the interior, home, or public security ministries in other countries.

entity: Center for the Study of Violence and Reconciliation
surface_forms: Center for Violence, Trauma and something along those lines

description_wiki: Canada is a country in North America.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.
The International Organization for Migration (IOM) is a United Nations related organization working in the field of migration.
